overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the historic city of Saint Denis. The character navigates cobblestone streets, crosses intersections with horse-drawn carriages and a streetcar, and walks along covered sidewalks past NPC pedestrians. The setting features historic New Orleans-style architecture with wrought iron balconies and brick buildings under clear sunny skies.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cobblestone sidewalk toward a major intersection, passing a wrought iron fence on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in a suit walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large red brick building with white trim and multiple balconies, featuring a hotel sign
black ornate metal fence running along the right side of the path
historic building with curved corner and wrought iron balcony railings
wooden telegraph pole with multiple cross-arms and wires

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit cobblestone sidewalk bordered by a wrought iron fence, approaching a historic hotel building at the intersection. Sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the opposite direction as the camera maintains a steady third-person follow perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy cobblestone intersection with horse and rail traffic

events.description: green streetcar passes left to right across the intersection
horse-drawn carriage crosses in front of the character, causing a brief pause
character resumes walking after waiting for carriage to pass, turning slightly right

agents.ego_description: navigating across the cobblestone intersection, stopping to let a horse carriage pass before continuing

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with two horses moving across the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: dark green electric streetcar with visible windows moving across the intersection
cylindrical black cast iron structure with a domed roof at the street corner
cylindrical metal garbage bin on the sidewalk
three-story yellow building with arched windows and shutters

segments.scene_description: The character enters a busy cobblestone intersection where a green streetcar passes by and horse-drawn carriages cross the path. After pausing for a carriage, the character continues across the open square, passing a cast iron information kiosk as the hotel building recedes into the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with commercial storefronts

events.description: character steps under the covered sidewalk awning, entering shade from the sun

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing storefronts

notable_agents.action: woman in a long dark skirt and white blouse walking along the covered sidewalk

entered.detail: overhead wooden and metal awning providing shade over the pedestrian walkway
stacked wooden barrels and crates outside a storefront
colorful poster on the building wall showing a woman's face

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open intersection into a covered sidewalk area shaded by an overhead awning. Walking past wooden barrels and advertising posters, the character moves along the pedestrian walkway as the yellow historic building becomes more prominent on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow historic street with continuous balconies and storefronts

events.description: street narrows significantly with buildings closing in on both sides

agents.ego_description: navigating through the narrower street, passing groups of pedestrians and approaching a more crowded area

notable_agents.action: man in a gray suit walking in the same direction ahead of the character

entered.detail: building with a sign reading LEGAL ADVISERS and a balcony above
continuous wrought iron balconies extending over the sidewalk from upper floors

segments.scene_description: The street narrows into a more enclosed corridor with continuous overhead balconies and storefronts including a Legal Advisers office. The character continues walking through this historic pedestrian area as the yellow building recedes into the distance and the covered walkway extends ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the bustling streets of Saint Denis, transitioning from an open, sunlit intersection into a shaded, enclosed pedestrian corridor. It begins with the character walking along a cobblestone sidewalk bordered by a wrought iron fence, steadily approaching a historic hotel at a bright intersection. As the character enters the open square, the scene expands to include a passing green streetcar and horse-drawn carriages, moving past a cast iron information kiosk while the hotel recedes. The perspective then shifts from the open sunlight into the shade of a covered sidewalk, passing wooden barrels and advertising posters beside a prominent yellow building. Finally, the environment narrows into a dense corridor of storefronts and overhead balconies, moving past a Legal Advisers office as the walkway extends further into the historic district.
